subject: Strategic plan: file-reference drag-and-drop + unified attachment viewer
body:
## Current Attachment System

The model is `FollowUpAttachment` (sealed record in `FollowUpAttachment.cs`). Current types:

| Type | Key field | Pre-send chip | Transcript click |
|---|---|---|---|
| Image | `ImagePath` | 📷 (image N) | Tab viewer: inline zoom preview |
| Transcript quote | `TranscriptQuote` | ↩ "quote" | Tab viewer: text |
| Content block (task/note/topic) | `ContentBlock` | 📎/📝 label | Tab viewer: stripped XML text |
| Inbox excerpt | `ContentBlock` + `InboxMessageId` | 📎 label | *Single:* opens inbox + highlights. *Multi:* tab viewer |
| Commit follow-up | `CommitSha` | ↩ SHA — label | Tab viewer: metadata |

**Tab control theming:** Already uses `SetResourceReference` for `ThemedTabControlStyle` and `ThemedTabItemStyle`. ✅

---

## New Feature: File Reference Attachments

### Phase 1 — Data model
Add `FileReferencePath` (`string?`) to `FollowUpAttachment` record and its DTO. A file attachment is identified when this field is non-null. `Description` holds the filename leaf; `FileReferencePath` holds the full path.

### Phase 2 — Drag and drop
On `PromptTextBox` (defined in `MainWindow.xaml` line 2449):
- Add `AllowDrop="True"`
- Handle `PreviewDragEnter`/`PreviewDragOver`: accept only `DataFormats.FileDrop`, set `Effects = Copy`
- Handle `PreviewDrop`: extract `string[]` from drop data, create one `FollowUpAttachment` per file path, add to `_followUpAttachments`, call `UpdateFollowUpStrip()`

### Phase 3 — Pre-send chip
In `UpdateFollowUpStrip()` (MainWindow.xaml.cs ~line 28399):
- Icon: 📁
- Label: filename leaf only (40 char max)
- Tooltip: full path
- Click: `Process.Start("explorer.exe", $"/select,\"{path}\"")`

### Phase 4 — Tab viewer content
In `PromptAttachmentViewerWindow.BuildAttachmentContent()`:
- **Image extensions** (.png/.jpg/.bmp/.gif): inline preview + path text + "Open in Explorer" button
- **Other files**: monospace selectable path text + "Open in Explorer" button

### Phase 5 — Fix inbox excerpt in multi-tab viewer
Add "Open in Inbox" button to the inbox-excerpt tab content. Currently shows text only with no navigation action.

---

## Unified Primary Action Pattern

Every tab in the viewer gets a primary action button:

| Attachment type | Content | Action button |
|---|---|---|
| Image | Inline preview | — |
| File ref — image | Preview + path | Open in Explorer |
| File ref — other | Full path text | Open in Explorer |
| Transcript quote | Quote text | — |
| Content block | Rendered text | — |
| **Inbox excerpt** | Excerpt text | **Open in Inbox** |
| Commit follow-up | SHA + metadata | Open on GitHub |

---

## Suggested commit sequence
1. Data model + drag/drop + pre-send chip
2. Viewer tabs for file refs + inbox-excerpt action button fix

actions.label: Implement it
actions.prompt: Please implement the file-reference drag-and-drop attachment feature as planned. The plan is in the Inbox message titled 'Strategic plan: file-reference drag-and-drop + unified attachment viewer'. Two commits: (1) data model (add FileReferencePath to FollowUpAttachment and FollowUpAttachmentDto), drag-and-drop wiring on PromptTextBox, pre-send chip with 📁 icon and explorer click; (2) viewer tab support for file references (image preview for image files, path+button for others) plus add 'Open in Inbox' action button to the inbox-excerpt tab in PromptAttachmentViewerWindow.
